'''ât-zh-z''' ('''katazhaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queerize|queerize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queerize|queerize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-zh-z
|-
! Lemma
| katazhaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitazhaz|thitazhaz]] || [[word:jitazhaz|jitazhaz]] || [[word:shitazhaz|shitazhaz]] || [[word:kitazhaz|kitazhaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutazhaz|thuthutazhaz]] || [[word:jujutazhaz|jujutazhaz]] || [[word:shushutazhaz|shushutazhaz]] || [[word:kukutazhaz|kukutazhaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutazhaz|thutazhaz]] || [[word:jutazhaz|jutazhaz]] || [[word:shutazhaz|shutazhaz]] || [[word:kutazhaz|kutazhaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutazhaz|thutazhaz]] || [[word:jutazhaz|jutazhaz]] || [[word:shutazhaz|shutazhaz]] || [[word:kutazhaz|kutazhaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetazhaz|thetazhaz]] || [[word:jetazhaz|jetazhaz]] || [[word:shetazhaz|shetazhaz]] || [[word:ketazhaz|ketazhaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotazhaz|thothotazhaz]] || [[word:jojotazhaz|jojotazhaz]] || [[word:shoshotazhaz|shoshotazhaz]] || [[word:kokotazhaz|kokotazhaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotazhaz|thotazhaz]] || [[word:jotazhaz|jotazhaz]] || [[word:shotazhaz|shotazhaz]] || [[word:kotazhaz|kotazhaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotazhaz|thotazhaz]] || [[word:jotazhaz|jotazhaz]] || [[word:shotazhaz|shotazhaz]] || [[word:kotazhaz|kotazhaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtazhaz|thĂŠtazhaz]] || [[word:jĂŠtazhaz|jĂŠtazhaz]] || [[word:shĂŠtazhaz|shĂŠtazhaz]] || [[word:kĂŠtazhaz|kĂŠtazhaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatazhaz|thathatazhaz]] || [[word:jajatazhaz|jajatazhaz]] || [[word:shashatazhaz|shashatazhaz]] || [[word:kakatazhaz|kakatazhaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatazhaz|thatazhaz]] || [[word:jatazhaz|jatazhaz]] || [[word:shatazhaz|shatazhaz]] || [[word:katazhaz|katazhaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatazhaz|thatazhaz]] || [[word:jatazhaz|jatazhaz]] || [[word:shatazhaz|shatazhaz]] || [[word:katazhaz|katazhaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatazhaz|shatazhaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatazhaz|goshatazhaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatazhaz|gokishatazhaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatazhaznĂŒ|shatazhaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhaznknĂŒ|goshatazhaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhaznĂŒ|gokishatazhaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatazhazshĂ«|shatazhazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkshĂ«|goshatazhaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatazhazshĂ«|gokishatazhazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhazro|shatazhazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkro|goshatazhaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhazro|gokishatazhazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhazmu|shatazhazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkmu|goshatazhaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhazmu|gokishatazhazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatazhazsher|shatazhazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatazhaznksher|goshatazhaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatazhazsher|gokishatazhazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatazhazng|shatazhazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkng|goshatazhaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatazhazng|gokishatazhazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatazhazya|shatazhazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkya|goshatazhaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatazhazya|gokishatazhazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatazhazyam|shatazhazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkyam|goshatazhaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatazhazyam|gokishatazhazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhaznĂŒshĂ«|shatazhaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshatazhaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishatazhaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhaznĂŒro|shatazhaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhaznknĂŒro|goshatazhaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhaznĂŒro|gokishatazhaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhaznĂŒmu|shatazhaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhaznknĂŒmu|goshatazhaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhaznĂŒmu|gokishatazhaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhazshĂ«nĂŒ|shatazhazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatazhaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatazhazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhazshĂ«ro|shatazhazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkshĂ«ro|goshatazhaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhazshĂ«ro|gokishatazhazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhazshĂ«mu|shatazhazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkshĂ«mu|goshatazhaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhazshĂ«mu|gokishatazhazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhazronĂŒ|shatazhazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkronĂŒ|goshatazhaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhazronĂŒ|gokishatazhazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhazroshĂ«|shatazhazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkroshĂ«|goshatazhaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhazroshĂ«|gokishatazhazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhazromu|shatazhazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkromu|goshatazhaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhazromu|gokishatazhazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhazmunĂŒ|shatazhazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkmunĂŒ|goshatazhaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhazmunĂŒ|gokishatazhazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhazmushĂ«|shatazhazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkmushĂ«|goshatazhaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhazmushĂ«|gokishatazhazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhazmuro|shatazhazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhaznkmuro|goshatazhaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhazmuro|gokishatazhazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
